content.en:
3BLD OP Method (Old Pochmann)

(Outdated)

OP/OP is a 2-cycle BLD method which solves one piece at a time, using PLL algorithms (T), (J) and (L) for edges as well as (Y) for corners with appropriate setup moves.

记号Notation

X goes to Y = the correct position of sticker X is sticker Y, in the sense of solved cube;

Old piece = piece shown before; New piece = piece not shown before; X: Y = X Y X'.

Main cycle = cycle that includes buffer. Small cycle = cycle that includes no buffer.

Memo Rules

Stickers C,J,M of corner buffer UFR and stickers C,I of edge buffer UF should never be memorized.

First memorize main cycle (if exists) and then memorize small cycle (if exists).

If buffer piece is in place, then there is no main cycle.

Start main cycle of corner (edge) with corner (edge) buffer E (B), and stop it when meeting corner (edge) buffer UBL (UR).

If there is no main cycle or main cycle does not cover all unsolved pieces, then there exists small cycle.

Start a small cycle with any sticker of any new unsolved pieces, and stop it when meeting this pieces.

Twisty corner and Flipped edge are both 2-cycle and can be memorized using spatial memory.

# edge (corner) letters + # edges (corners) in place - # edge (corner) small cycles = 11 (7) (buffer cannot be counted as a solved piece).

The number of corners and the number of edges should always be both even or both odd.

Image Corner Memo

Scramble: U2 B D' U' L2 R2 U2 R F R' L U' B' L' B2 F2 L' F2 B2 D' R2 U2 D2 R2 L. Do x2 y to make yellow on top and red on front.

Main cycle: E goes to N, which goes to E (old), then cycle is over and we get N;

Small cycle #1: D goes to O, which goes to G, which goes to X, which goes to J, which goes to I (old), then cycle is over and we get ND OG XJ I;

Small cycle #2: V goes to P (old) (actually this corner twists clockwise), then cycle is over and we get ND OG XJ IV P. Since all the corner pieces are covered, corner memorization is over. The number of corner letters is odd.

Audio Edge Memo

Main cycle: B goes to M (old), then this cycle is over, and we get nothing;

Small cycle #1: C goes to E, which goes to W, which goes to U, which goes to G, which goes to T, which goes to P, which goes to Q, which goes to C (old), then cycle is over and we get CE WU GT PQ C;

Small cycle #2: L goes to H, which goes to V, which goes to F (old), then cycle is over and we get CE WU GT PQ CL HV F. Since all the edge pieces are covered, edge memorization is over.

实例

402 STM

U2 B D' U' L2 R2 U2 R F R' L U' B' L' B2 F2 L' F2 B2 D' R2 U2 D2 R2 L
